**Medical Assessment and Rating Board for Indian System of Medicine**

**National Commission for Indian System of Medicine, New Delhi**

**Assessment Report of Ayurvedic Medical Colleges for the Academic Session 2026-27**

**File no. 3-4/MARB/2025-Ay.(53)**

**Dated:-GOLDEN**

It is submitted that **Gaur Brahmin Ayurvedic College & Hospital, Rohtak, Haryana (Inst. ID-AYU0038)** was visited on **2026-05-06 and 2026-05-07** to assess the available facilities of teaching and practical training for **Annual visitation for issuance of Annual permission with intake capacity of 100 seats in UG (BAMS) course for the academic session 2026-27 under section 28/29 of NCISM Act, 2020** by the visitors namely:-

| **S. No.** | **Visitor’s Name** | **Visitor ID** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dr. Kamlesh Sharma | V00508 |
| 2 | Dr. Sandeep | V02804 |
| 3 | Dr. Naimish Kishor Saraf | V02821 |


Further, it is submitted that after examination of the visitation report along with all the annexures submitted by the visitors following Compliance/shortcomings have been observed-

1. **Constructed Area :-** Constructed area of the college is 4786 sq.mt., constructed area of the hospital is 3752 sq.mt. And constructed area of the Herbal garden 18207 sq.mt are fulfilling as per schedule III of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
2. **Area of the Common Departments :-** Total Area of Lecture Halls is 805, against the minimum requirement of 800. So, there is a **fulfilling the criteria.**.
3. **Lecture Halls :- No. of lecture hall are 5 against the requirement of 5 and fulfilling the criteria as per Table-1 of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024.**
4. **Area of the Teaching Departments :- All departments are fulfilling/and shortcoming as per schedule III of MESAR UG Ayurveda,2024.**
5. **Teaching departments :-** Computer and printer are available in dean and MS office.
6. **Central Library:-** fulfilling the criteria as per regulation 17 (3) of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024 and details are as under-
    - Sitting arrangement – adequate
    - Sitting capacity-120
    - No. of computer available with internet facility- 12
    - Total number of books -13961
7. **Herbal Garden:-** Number of species is 290 and fulfilling the criteria as per sub-regulation 6 (C) of regulation 19 of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
8. **Teaching Pharmacy:-**
    - Functional status- Functional
    - Sitting arrangements- Satisfactory
    - Equipment status – Satisfactory
    - Infrastructure- Satisfactory
    - Quality testing lab is available as per Sub-regulation 7 & 8 of regulation 19 of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
9. **Biometric attendance:- Fulfilling the criteria as per Regulation 9 of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**
    - Aadhar enabled biometric System to track attendance of the teaching staff – Available
    - Aadhar enabled biometric System to track attendance of the **non-teaching staff** – Available
    - Aadhar enabled biometric System to track attendance of the **Hospital Staff –** Available
10. **College website:-**
    - 1. Information uploaded on college website available as per Regulation 11 of MESAR (UG) Ayurveda 2024.
    - 2. College website:- Functional

**11.Teaching staffs:- Fulfilling the criteria as per schedule IV of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**

1. Yoga teacher is available.
2. Bio-statistician is available.
3. There are no absent teachers on the day of visitation.

**12) Non-teaching staff: - Not fulfilling the criteria as per schedule V of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**

1. **Shortcoming is as under-**

| **Department** | **Post** | **Required as per MSR** | **Existing** | **Shortcomings** | **Punitive policy** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Quality Control Laboratory | Analytical Chemist | 1 | 0 | 1 | No seat reduction |
| Quality Control Laboratory | Clerk | 1 | 0 | 1 | No seat reduction |
| Quality Control Laboratory | Lab Attendant | 1 | 0 | 1 | No seat reduction |

2. Out of 75 non-teaching staffs, 8 staff were absent on the day of visitation.

**13) Hospital staffs:- Fulfilling the criteria as per schedule XX of MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**

1. Out of 85 hospital staffs, 9 staff were absent on the day of visitation.


**14. Hospital Infrastructure details-**

**Constructed area of the hospital is fulfilling the requirement as per MESAR UG Ayurveda 2024**

1. **Functionality of the hospital:-**
2. No. of OPD:- 9
3. Total 68465 no. of patients attended OPD against the minimum requirement of 36000 no. of patients.
4. Average attendance of patient in OPD per day is 228.22 against the minimum requirement of 120.
5. Total 1334 no. of patients admitted in IPD.
6. Average bed occupancy percentage is 63.27%.
7. There were 02 deliveries conducted. Labour room is functional.
8. There were 2174 operations conducted.
9. Clinical laboratory is functional.
10. Labour room is functional.
11. Ksharsutra block is functional.
12. OPD is functional
13. IPD is functional
14. Computerized central registration system is available.
15. **Mean** of general and essential equipment’s/instruments availability is 99.2%.

16. **Observation by the visitors:-**
17. No ICU is available in the hospital.
18. Death record and intern duty roasters not available.
19. Samhita department does not have a language laboratory.
20. **Other Observation :-**
21. Any penalty/legal case pending- No legal case or penalty imposed or pending.
22. Rating 2025-26 – not eligible
23. Consent of Affiliation 2026-27- Not submitted
24. **Compliance report:– Not submitted**

No punitive action attracted. The college is compliant with the assessed criteria.
